body:
Stable imports:

```python
from ssot_registry.api import (
    load_registry,
    save_registry,
    validate_registry,
    plan_features,
    set_feature_lifecycle,
    plan_issues,
    evaluate_claims,
    verify_evidence_rows,
    freeze_boundary,
    certify_release,
    promote_release,
    publish_release,
    revoke_release,
    export_graph,
    create_document,
    update_document,
)
```

Authored document mutations SHALL support source selection through Python API parameters:

```python
create_document(..., body: str | None = None, body_file: str | Path | None = None, ...)
update_document(..., body: str | None = None, body_file: str | Path | None = None, ...)
```

API source-selection rules:
- `create_document()` SHALL require exactly one of `body` or `body_file`
- `update_document()` SHALL allow zero or one of `body` or `body_file`
- both APIs SHALL reject requests that provide both `body` and `body_file`
- `update_document()` with neither input SHALL preserve the existing authored body while applying other requested mutable-field changes
title: Python API
